name: # Pirate's Gold.. fish 💛🐠
description:
“Look at ‘im, lads. Face soft as a maid’s. Pretty little sea-girl, this one.”

Apart from looking like a goldfish he hates your guts too. But who cares? Apparently not you. And not your crew.

───── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ─────

  • 🏴‍☠️💔 You are a pirate. You and your crew are a bunch of assholes, one of the most infamous pirate crews of your times.

  • 🏴‍☠️🥷 Open Scenario: Intro message doesn't mention {{user}} at all, so technically you can play how you want. You can insert yourself as:

    • 👑 Captain - intended by default,

    • another crew member: Boatswain, Deckhand, Quartermaster’s, Gunner etc.

    • maybe even another merfolk - maybe observing from the waters or another held captive.

  • 👤 AnyPOV. Somehow AI seems to be more scared of male captains tho 😅 Tested on males and females. infuriating ik

  • 🐬 Made with Deepseek in mind. Mostly tested on 0324, 0528 and R1. Can't guarantee JLLM will pick up bots personality correctly, I got tired fighting to make every bot work with everything. So I just recommend DS, 0528 is my favorite currently.

───── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ─────

⚠️ WARNINGS ⚠️

  • 🕊️ Kinda toxic scenario. Power imbalance is as usual with my bots.. severe, and this particular one - in {{user}}'s favor. It's meant to give you chance to act right but what would rightness mean if you were not tempted to act wrong..😛?

  • 🕊️ Pirates are crude and can get vulgar or even violent, depending how the rp unfolds

  • 🕊️ I did not put dead dove because char as such does not have any agression or ddde content coded. Only potential ddde source would be you.

───── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ─────

Comments

I somehow felt there isn't enough submissive merfolk bots. So yeah.

PS. Yes, spin off on classic mermaid x pirate trope. How original. I know.

PPS. Also I am probably super late to the game but WHAT WE CAN ADD PICTURES HERE?! Now I absolutely have to spam cute boys pictures cause I have like five million alt images muahah💀.

Sorry.
creator: AstralHawaii
